channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-14947] recovery-small test_26a: client not evicted from OST
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/acf1ad3c-16d3-4cac-9376-40485f9ed5f1

test_26a failed with the following error originally:

/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh: line 9622: ((: > 1629171082: syntax error: operand expected (error token is "> 1629171082")
client not evicted from OST

More recently this is failing with:

Update not seen after 99s: want '17' got '18'
 recovery-small test_26b: @@@@@@ FAIL: Client was not evicted by MDS

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
recovery-small test_26a - client not evicted from OST
item.summary: recovery-small test_26a: client not evicted from OST

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
+1 on master with the patch above: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/518572ae-85fb-41f2-95ff-194eb48b583c

This is really LU-19242/LU-18878.
Merged for 2.17

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60751/
Subject: LU-14947 tests: recovery-small test_26b to use proper mount
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: ebd1e93ef402e8c51114ba930dd9e3505789c48e

Possibly because recovery-small.sh test_26b is hard-coding the timeouts that have been adjusted by the patch, and now they are out of sync:

test_26b() {
        :
        # see ptlrpc_export_timeout() for the pinger case; take a bit more the test sake
        local TOUT=$((INTERVAL * 2 + (TIMEOUT / 20 + 5 + TIMEOUT) * 3))
        TOUT=$((TOUT + (TOUT >> 3)))
        echo i $INTERVAL m $AT_MAX_SAVED t $TIMEOUT $TOUT
        wait_client_evicted ost1 $ost_nexp $TOUT ||
                error "Client was not evicted by OSS"
        wait_client_evicted mds1 $mds_nexp $TOUT ||
                error "Client was not evicted by MDS"

It seems possible/probable that the failure was caused by patch https://review.whamcloud.com/60085 ("LU-18878 ptlrpc: evictor/prolong timeout formula fix"), since it is messing with eviction timeouts. To my reading this patch should be more likely to evict a client quickly, which would make the subtest happy, but something else is happening.

vitaly_fertman, any thoughts?

It appears that this started failing significantly more often on 2025-08-02, but I can't see any patch landed on that date which seems related, and no sessions failed similarly on master-next going back to 2025-07-15, so it doesn't appear to be related to a patch landing unless it is a bad interaction between two patches (though that should also have appeared on master-next):

$ git log --oneline --after 2025-07-27 --before 2025-08-04
48301dd962 LU-17716 utils: add "tunefs.lustre --replace" option
d16a9f9451 LU-18356 tests: fix skipping symbolic version code
2e49bc7dd1 LU-18812 lnet: restrict IP addresses that socklnd listens on
916d7bd9d3 LU-18958 osd: improve quota declarations in setattr
f3376e8735 LU-16374 ldiskfs: implement security.encdata xattr for el9.6
e90c6a428e LU-12188 uapi: add LOV_PATTERN_PARITY
0498ab0fd6 LU-18878 ptlrpc: evictor/prolong timeout formula fix
ae23c15831 LU-18945 ldlm: discard invalid lock request

AFAICS, this also doesn't appear to be specific to a kernel/distro version.

"Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60751
Subject: LU-14947 tests: recovery-small test_26b to use proper mount
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: b257ca7af514c2b0f776b66139bdf2455c8207aa
unfortunately fix is not enough and issue needs more close investigation

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60612/
Subject: LU-14947 tests: recovery-small 26b to create file on MDT0
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: d027507b518000720c48f4af27123b5b64d089ba

"Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60612
Subject: LU-14947 tests: recovery-small 26b to create file on MDT0
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 4cec53a965807b33e81c40d9356dbc537af46f20
I've found at least one reason for that failure - client eviction is checked on wrong MDT in DNE environment, I will prepare fix
Still seeing this on master - 20x in the past week.
Merged for 2.17

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56949/
Subject: LU-14947 test: recovery_small/26a fix
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: d6e4f2843b6fe3a6bb3821d732d9bf9354c51cc8

"Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56949
Subject: LU-14947 test: recovery_small/26a fix
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 039093648bbe7ba9efa5cd3eeefc1b0fdf9c75b5

For test 26a there are two main reasons of failure. One is caused by script:

test-framework.sh: line 9144: ((: > 1636932232: syntax error: operand expected (error token is "> 1636932232")

and was fixed in master by "LU-10632 tests: recovery-small test_26 idle_timeout" https://review.whamcloud.com/42006

Second reason is due to LU-14708 most likely, especially when test is being ran alone. I am going to add fix for that 

 

All other report here are either for test 26b, or from branches not having patches above.

Also failed on b2_15 branch:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/2f3ce1ef-74a7-4dcc-bafc-974c43b5d589
https://testing.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/14ccf6bb-aad5-4d60-8886-30e56e432fdd
+1 on master: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/e08886ca-7dcf-4505-b690-29697f81b197

All of these recent failures were on test_26b and not test_26a.  It appears that test_26a may have been fixed by patch https://review.whamcloud.com/47928 "LU-16002 ptlrpc: reduce pinger eviction time" that landed on 2022-10-15.

I think the test_26a failures will be fixed by patch https://review.whamcloud.com/56356 "LU-12066 tests: activate OSTs in recovery-small/26b".
+1 https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/13998f8e-54b8-4121-b1af-cc186b2ba5cc

+1 on master: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/55e394f2-23f6-4725-a249-bdf519eaac4a

This seems to fail a lot lately (on different patches):
https://testing.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/dd3a9596-5f3b-4a0e-b4f8-d72c57d9f93c
https://testing.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/b22c7878-c289-4e5a-9302-8dfa23a70d7c
https://testing.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/260eca1c-74b5-48a6-9449-ed40a2ac4117
https://testing.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/87ef20f6-d716-4f18-9916-516fb81e7b2d

Waiting 0s for '6'
Update not seen after 40s: want '6' got '4'
 recovery-small test_26b: @@@@@@ FAIL: Client was not evicted by ost

There is a patch in LU-12066 (duplicate of this one) which may fix this problem for test_26b, and the same change may also fix test_26a. I would close this as a duplicate, but the error message has changed slightly and this ticket matches the current message, and I don't want to close LU-12066 because it has the patch. First step should be to review/rebase that patch to see if it fixes the problem.

Hi tappro 

Here's another one we're seeing. Can you please take a look? Thank you!

+1 on master
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/d0a65bcc-9af0-4224-9727-41507dfce00f

This was induced by https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/43834/

+1 on master
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/d0a65bcc-9af0-4224-9727-41507dfce00f

+1 on master
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f4a1c4f1-b91b-4648-abcd-19f452939b6c

I think this is the same issue as reported in the closed ticket LU-10632.

For 2.12.8 we’ve see it a couple of times in November
2.12.7.28 - https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/0ee7439d-1b67-436e-bbb9-2bc9d0561594
2.12.8 - https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/48b57407-656d-46a2-bcb5-2809ffc48c29
and for master once in the past two months
2.14.55.43 - https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/d594a8a7-9153-4741-8289-1258864c9c80

From the master failure, we see that no eviction took place in the time frame expected

Check state for lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800
CMD: trevis-209vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800.state
lustre-OST0000-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800 is evicted at 1634938357
Check state for lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800
CMD: trevis-209vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800.state
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh: line 9488: ((: > 1634938297: syntax error: operand expected (error token is "> 1634938297")
lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800 was not evicted after 1634938297:
CMD: trevis-209vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800.state
 - [ 1634938350, DISCONN ]
 - [ 1634938350, CONNECTING ]
 - [ 1634938351, DISCONN ]
 - [ 1634938351, CONNECTING ]
 - [ 1634938352, DISCONN ]
 - [ 1634938352, CONNECTING ]
 - [ 1634938352, RECOVER ]
 - [ 1634938352, FULL ]
Check state for lustre-OST0002-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800
CMD: trevis-209vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param osc.lustre-OST0002-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800.state
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh: line 9488: ((: > 1634938297: syntax error: operand expected (error token is "> 1634938297")
lustre-OST0002-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800 was not evicted after 1634938297:
CMD: trevis-209vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param osc.lustre-OST0002-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800.state
 - [ 1634938350, DISCONN ]

/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh: line 9488: ((: > 1634938297: syntax error: operand expected (error token is "> 1634938297")
lustre-OST0006-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800 was not evicted after 1634938297:
CMD: trevis-209vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param osc.lustre-OST0006-osc-ffff97ad5fb89800.state

 recovery-small test_26a: @@@@@@ FAIL: client not evicted from OST 
  Trace dump:
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6320:error()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:9498:check_clients_evicted()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/recovery-small.sh:1087:test_26a()

The 2.12.8 failure at https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/0ee7439d-1b67-436e-bbb9-2bc9d0561594 looks like an eviction did take place in time

Check state for lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff98697bf0b000
CMD: onyx-66vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff98697bf0b000.state
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh: line 9144: ((: > 1636932232: syntax error: operand expected (error token is "> 1636932232")
lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff98697bf0b000 was not evicted after 1636932232:
CMD: onyx-66vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param osc.lustre-OST0001-osc-ffff98697bf0b000.state
 - [ 1636932288, CONNECTING ]
 - [ 1636932288, EVICTED ]
 - [ 1636932288, RECOVER ]
 - [ 1636932288, FULL ]
 - [ 1636932308, CONNECTING ]
 - [ 1636932308, IDLE ]
 - [ 1636932313, CONNECTING ]
 - [ 1636932313, FULL ]

Found similar issue in recovery-small test set on 2.12.8: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/48b57407-656d-46a2-bcb5-2809ffc48c29 

recovery-small test_26a: @@@@@@ FAIL: client not evicted from OST 
  Trace dump:
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:5919:error()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:9154:check_clients_evicted()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/recovery-small.sh:1094:test_26a()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6222:run_one()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6271:run_one_logged()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6111:run_test()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/recovery-small.sh:1097:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-1/2021-11-20/lustre-b2_12_failover-part-1_150_1_40_13db9919-f21e-4132-8be9-3d11b4f5908e//recovery-small.test_26a.*.1637428776.log
CMD: onyx-109vm10,onyx-24vm6,onyx-64vm1.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-64vm3,onyx-64vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-1/2021-11-20/lustre-b2_12_failover-part-1_150_1_40_13db9919-f21e-4132-8be9-3d11b4f5908e//recovery-small.test_26a.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1637428776.log;
